name: True Love Never Dies... It Festers
original_name: True Love Never Dies... It Festers
overview:
A horror comedy micro sitcom starring Alexis Allotta as the Widow, "the wittiest witch of the Midwest" and Adam Michaels as her corpse of a husband, Charlie.

A prisoner on the Widow's basement couch, Charlie's been condemned by his wife to spend an eternity indulging her favorite pastime, watching horror movies.
